channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Alphabet Lane Explores Isolation and Psychological Collapse in Rural Australia
item.description: Alphabet Lane, directed by James Litchfield, is a psychological thriller that deconstructs the romanticised notion of rural life in Australia. The film follows Jack (Nicholas Denton) and Anna (Tilda C...

item.title: TTCL achieves profitability after major operational and financial restructuring
item.description: The Tanzania Telecommunications Corporation Limited (TTCL), a fully government-owned telecom company, has reported a significant financial turnaround after years of losses. In an interview, Director G...

item.title: French Government Agency Managing Citizen IDs Reports Data Breach
item.description: The French government agency responsible for issuing and managing citizens' identity documents, including national IDs, passports, and immigration records, has confirmed a data breach. The Agence Nati...

item.title: Japan Advances Undersea Mining to Reduce Dependence on Chinese Rare Earths
item.description: Japan is making a strategic push to reduce its dependence on Chinese rare earths by developing one of the world's most promising underwater deposits near the remote atoll of Minamitorishima. Situated ...

item.title: WestJet hikes baggage fees again as rising fuel costs drive airline price increases
item.description: WestJet has announced another increase to its checked baggage fees, marking the third hike in three years and following a similar move by Air Canada earlier in April 2026. The new pricing applies to b...

item.title: Teacher Cillah Reflects on Njugush and Wakavinye's Impact on Her Life Following Their Breakup
item.description: Teacher Cillah has opened up about the emotional impact of comedian Njugush and his wife Celestine Ndinda, better known as Wakavinye, on her life after their recent split. Njugush announced the separa...

item.title: My Obsession with The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: 15 Seasons in Under a Year
item.description: In less than a year, the author binge-watched all 15 seasons of *The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills*, equating to around 250 hours of reality television. This addiction to the series, filled with dr...

item.title: Michaela Leonard set to become Australia’s most-capped Wallaroo
item.description: Michaela Leonard is poised to make history in Australian women's rugby by becoming the most-capped Wallaroo of all time when she plays her 47th Test against New Zealand on Anzac Day. Leonard’s sportin...

item.title: Ruto Pushes African Nations to Prioritise Local Funding for Infrastructure Growth
item.description: President William Ruto has urged African countries to rely more on their own financial resources to fund infrastructure projects, warning that overdependence on foreign capital is slowing the continen...

item.title: Brandon Petersen aims for redemption in upcoming Soweto derby
item.description: Kaizer Chiefs goalkeeper Brandon Petersen is determined to make up for his absence in the first Soweto derby after injury kept him sidelined. The 31-year-old missed the 3-0 defeat against Orlando Pira...

item.title: Two London, Ont. Friends Win $80 Million Lotto Max Jackpot
item.description: Two longtime friends from London, Ontario, are celebrating a life-changing win after claiming the $80-million Lotto Max jackpot from the December 30, 2025, draw. The Ontario Lottery and Gaming Corpora...

item.title: Madibeng mayor Maimane demands reasons for removal from ANC
item.description: Douglas Maimane, who was recently removed as the mayor of Madibeng, has issued a legal letter demanding reasons for his dismissal. The ANC confirmed that it had received the letter but stood by its de...

item.title: Suspected Killers of Angwan Rukuba Attack Arraigned in Plateau State Court
item.description: Four suspects linked to the deadly Angwan Rukuba killings in Plateau State were arraigned before the Plateau High Court on Thursday, April 23, 2026, under tight security. The suspects were arrested by...

item.title: Steering Committee advances preparations for AFCON 2027 in East Africa
item.description: The Main Steering Committee for AFCON 2027 has convened in Kampala, Uganda to push forward preparations for the continental football tournament, which will be hosted jointly by Tanzania, Kenya, and Ug...

item.title: Sara Duterte Faces Impeachment Over Alleged Wealth and Fund Misuse
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte is currently facing impeachment proceedings over accusations of misusing public funds and unexplained wealth. Various constitutional provisions and laws are cited in the di...

item.title: Cast of “Blood vs Duty” Shares Thoughts on Their Roles
item.description: The lead actors of the popular TV series “Blood vs Duty” recently opened up about their experiences portraying their respective characters. Richard Gutierrez, Gerald Anderson, Bela Padilla, Baron Geis...

item.title: KCMC's Sh3 Billion Heart Centre to Transform Cardiac Care in Tanzania
item.description: The Kilimanjaro Christian Medical Centre (KCMC) is making significant strides towards improving heart care in Tanzania with the launch of a Sh3 billion cardiac centre, aimed at providing accessible, l...

item.title: House committee continues impeachment hearings on VP Sara Duterte amid financial scrutiny and AMLC findings
item.description: The House Committee on Justice in the Philippines continued its impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte during its April 22 hearing, focusing heavily on allegations of unexplained ...

item.title: Key Developments Leading to Duterte’s ICC Trial Over Drug War Killings
item.description: Rodrigo Duterte is set to face trial at the International Criminal Court (ICC) over alleged crimes against humanity linked to his war on drugs in the Philippines. The ICC pre-trial chamber confirmed a...

item.title: Simba face JKU as Singida meet Mlandege in Union Cup quarterfinals in Zanzibar
item.description: Simba SC and Singida Black Stars have kicked off their Union Cup journey in Zanzibar with high expectations as both teams aim to progress to the semifinals. Simba are facing JKU SC in a much-anticipat...
